---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Reproduction

```python
from raghub import RAG
rag = RAG()
# ...
```

## Expected behaviour

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happens. Include the full traceback if applicable.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python: [e.g. 3.12.7]
- raghub: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- LLM provider: [e.g. LiteLLM via OpenAI, HeuristicLLMProvider]
- Vector store: [e.g. Qdrant, InMemoryVectorStore]
